hero.subtitle1: Consulting and a private community for entrepreneurs.
hero.subtitle2: An ecosystem for scaling you and your business.

about.titleBefore: We combine the power of your network,
about.lead: Into one engine for reaching your goals
about.p1Text: Personal and group consulting, growth tools for business and people, and a personal Board of Directors.
about.p2Text: Networking, masterminds, speaker forums, and business visits to leading companies.
about.p3Text: Training, seminars, online courses, and a growth accelerator — 17+ programs from practicing experts.

ethics.label: UNION Code of Ethics
ethics.subtitle: Six principles that define the quality of our community

values.title: Leadership
values.text: The willingness to lead and own the outcome.

values.title: Accountability
values.text: Keeping commitments to yourself, your team, and the community.

values.title: Trust
values.text: A safe space to share experience openly.

values.title: Respect
values.text: Recognizing each resident’s achievements and boundaries.

values.title: Dialogue
values.text: Solving challenges constructively through collective intelligence.

levels.label: Community architecture
levels.subtitle: From first contact to deep transformation — find your tier

membership.subtitle: Each tier includes everything in the previous one
membership.founderText: For business owners ready for deep personal and team transformation.
founderBullets: Personal support: 52 meetings per year (21 online + 21 offline)
Closed sessions with UNION founders twice a year

catalog.subtitle: 17 programs in three tracks from practicing experts

projects.subtitle: Additional opportunities for UNION residents
projects.c1Desc: We take on corporate learning end to end — from diagnostics to employee assessment systems.
projects.c1Li1: Needs analysis and gap mapping (competency map)
projects.c2Desc: For children and youth of residents: hands-on entrepreneurship with mentor guidance.
projects.c2Li3: Practical projects and startups with resident mentors

funnel.subtitle: A transparent selection process — from application to first networking

security.label: Security and exclusivity
security.b1Text: Reputation and background checks ensure you are surrounded by reliable partners with transparent businesses.
security.b2Text: Every resident signs an NDA so you can discuss real business issues without leakage risk.
security.quote: Your level of openness is protected legally.

application.label: Start here
application.subtitle: Complete the first screening and join the Union Consulting Group ecosystem.

application.successText: We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm details.
